Don’t Quit Your Corporate Job Too Early: A Financial Lesson Most Side Hustlers Learn the Hard Way

10 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Free Link
A few days ago, I had two interesting conversations that made me think deeply about the way many professionals approach side hustles.
The first person had around eight years of experience in the software industry. The second had more than fifteen years of experience. On paper, both were doing well. They had stable corporate careers, respectable salaries, and were earning additional income through their side hustles.
The younger professional was earning somewhere around ₹10–15 LPA from his full-time job and another ₹15,000–20,000 every month through a side hustle.
The senior professional was in an even better financial position. His corporate salary was in the ₹25–30 LPA range, while his side income was almost the same as the first person’s.
Although their careers were different, they both asked me exactly the same question.
“When should I quit my corporate job and focus completely on my side hustle?”
At first glance, it seems like a simple career decision. But as our conversations continued, I realized the…
